title: Display Metric Details in Slide-Out Panel
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see metric details in the slide-out panel, so that I can review metric information without leaving the current context.
description:
Re-display metric information (aliases, categories, related fields) in the slide-out panel. The data should be rendered as read-only for now, with edit capability planned for the future.

## Fields to Display
- Metric aliases
- Category assignment
- Related field information
acceptance_criteria: Metric details are displayed in the slide-out panel
Category dropdown remains functional for assignment
ux_changes: Metric details (aliases, categories, related fields) rendered in the slide-out panel for in-context viewing without navigation.
implementation_notes: Developer added the first three display options. Category dropdown was already present and functional.
comment_summary: Developer added the display fields and confirmed the category dropdown was already available.
